── ARUBA OS-CX / AOS-Switch (HPE) ─────────────────────────────────────────

Sintaxe similar ao Cisco IOS. NÃO inclua configure/end.

VLAN:
  ["vlan <VLAN_ID>", "name <NOME_VLAN>", "exit"]

VLAN (operações adicionais):
  Renomear VLAN:  ["vlan <VLAN_ID>", "name NOVO-NOME", "exit"]
  Deletar VLAN:   ["no vlan <VLAN_ID>"]
  Múltiplas:      ["vlan 100", "name GERENCIA", "exit", "vlan 200", "name CFTV", "exit"]

Interface acesso:
  ["interface 1/1/1",
   "no shutdown",
   "vlan access <VLAN_ID>",
   "spanning-tree port-type admin-edge",
   "exit"]

Interface trunk (uplink):
  ["interface 1/1/2",
   "no shutdown",
   "vlan trunk allowed <VLAN_A>,<VLAN_B>",
   "vlan trunk native <VLAN_NATIVA>",
   "exit"]

Interface com Voice VLAN (dados untagged + voz tagged):
  ["interface 1/1/3",
   "no shutdown",
   "vlan access <VLAN_DADOS>",
   "vlan voice <VLAN_VOZ>",
   "spanning-tree port-type admin-edge",
   "exit"]

Desativar porta:
  ["interface 1/1/5", "shutdown", "exit"]

Reativar porta:
  ["interface 1/1/5", "no shutdown", "exit"]

Interface L3 VLAN (SVI):
  ["interface vlan <VLAN_ID>",
   "ip address 192.168.100.1/24",
   "no shutdown",
   "exit"]

DHCP relay (dentro da interface VLAN):
  ["interface vlan <VLAN_ID>",
   "ip helper-address 10.0.0.1",
   "no shutdown",
   "exit"]

LAG / Port-channel:
  ["interface lag 1",
   "no shutdown",
   "lacp mode active",
   "exit",
   "interface 1/1/1",
   "no shutdown",
   "lag 1",
   "exit",
   "interface 1/1/2",
   "no shutdown",
   "lag 1",
   "exit"]

Rota estática:
  ["ip route 10.10.10.0/24 192.168.1.254"]

Rota padrão:
  ["ip route 0.0.0.0/0 192.168.1.254"]

ACL:
  ["ip access-list FM-PERMIT-HTTPS",
   "10 permit tcp 192.168.1.0/24 10.0.0.50/32 eq 443",
   "exit",
   "interface 1/1/1",
   "ip access-group FM-PERMIT-HTTPS in",
   "exit"]

STP/RSTP — global (ArubaOS-CX):
  Ativar/desativar:
    ["spanning-tree"]
    ["no spanning-tree"]

  Modo:
    ["spanning-tree mode rpvst"]    ← RPVST+ (per-VLAN) — recomendado
    ["spanning-tree mode mstp"]
    ["spanning-tree mode stp"]

  Priority (0-15, onde 1=4096, 2=8192, ..., 8=32768 padrão):
    ["spanning-tree priority 1"]    ← forçar root (= prioridade 4096)
    ["spanning-tree priority 7"]    ← root secundário (= 28672)
    ["spanning-tree priority 8"]    ← padrão (= 32768)

  Proteções globais:
    ["spanning-tree bpduguard default"]
    ["no spanning-tree bpduguard default"]
    ["spanning-tree loop-guard"]
    ["no spanning-tree loop-guard"]

  Timers:
    ["spanning-tree hello-time 2"]
    ["spanning-tree forward-delay 15"]
    ["spanning-tree max-age 20"]

STP/RSTP — por porta (dentro do bloco de interface):
  Tipo de porta:
    "spanning-tree port-type admin-edge"          ← portfast: hosts/servidores
    "no spanning-tree port-type admin-edge"
    "spanning-tree port-type admin-network"       ← uplinks entre switches

  Proteções:
    "spanning-tree bpduguard enable"
    "no spanning-tree bpduguard enable"
    "spanning-tree bpdufilter enable"
    "no spanning-tree bpdufilter enable"
    "spanning-tree root-guard"
    "no spanning-tree root-guard"
    "spanning-tree loop-guard"
    "no spanning-tree loop-guard"

  Custo e prioridade:
    "spanning-tree cost 20000"
    "spanning-tree port-priority 8"               ← 0-14; padrão=8 (= 128 × 16)

STP/RSTP — MSTP (quando mode mstp):
  Configuração:
    ["spanning-tree mst configuration",
     "name NOME_REGIAO",
     "revision 1",
     "instance 1 vlan 10,20,30",
     "exit"]
  Priority MST por instância:
    ["spanning-tree mst 1 priority 1"]
  Por porta:
    "spanning-tree mst 1 cost 20000"
    "spanning-tree mst 1 port-priority 8"

STP — show commands (diagnóstico):
  "show spanning-tree"
  "show spanning-tree summary"
  "show spanning-tree detail"
  "show spanning-tree interface 1/1/1"
  "show spanning-tree mst"
  "show spanning-tree mst configuration"

REGRAS IMPORTANTES PARA ARUBA:
- Interface naming: 1/1/X (slot/módulo/porta)
- BPDU Guard e edge port são configurados por interface (não globais por padrão)
- voice vlan adiciona a VLAN de voz tagged mantendo a VLAN de dados untagged
- LAG usa "interface lag N" + "lag N" dentro de cada membro

── LIST_VLANS (aruba): ssh_show_commands: ["show vlans"]

── LIST_PORTS (aruba):
  Geral:            ssh_show_commands: ["show interfaces brief"]
  Porta específica: ssh_show_commands: ["show interface 1/1/1", "show running-config interface 1/1/1"]
  Combinado:        ssh_show_commands: ["show vlans", "show interfaces brief"]

── GET_INFO exemplos (aruba):
  ssh_show_commands: ["show running-config"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show ip interface brief"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show version"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show mac-address-table"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show arp"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show spanning-tree"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show lldp neighbors"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show ip route"]

── SISTEMA (aruba):
  Hostname:       ["hostname SW-NOME"]
  Banner MOTD:    ["banner motd # Acesso Restrito. Monitorado e sujeito a sanções. #"]
  Syslog:         ["logging 10.0.0.1", "logging severity informational"]
  Remover syslog: ["no logging 10.0.0.1"]
  Desabilitar Telnet: ["no telnet-server", "ssh server vrf default"]

── NTP (aruba):
  ["ntp server 10.0.0.1 prefer",
   "ntp server 10.0.0.2",
   "ntp enable"]
  Timezone:    ["clock timezone BRT -3"]
  Remover NTP: ["no ntp server 10.0.0.1"]

── SNMP (aruba):
  Community RO: ["snmp-server community PUBLIC"]
  Localização e contato:
    ["snmp-server location DATACENTER-NOME",
     "snmp-server contact admin@empresa.com"]
  Trap host v2c: ["snmp-server host 10.0.0.70 community PUBLIC"]
  Desabilitar traps desnecessários:
    ["no snmp-server enable traps spanning-tree",
     "no snmp-server enable traps port-security"]

── GET_INFO DIAGNÓSTICO (aruba) — usuário descreve um PROBLEMA ──────────────────

CPU alta / processos travados:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show processes cpu", "show system resource-utilization",
    "show spanning-tree summary", "show mac-address-table count",
    "show interfaces brief", "show version"
  ]

Spanning-tree / instabilidade:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show spanning-tree summary", "show spanning-tree detail",
    "show mac-address-table count", "show interfaces brief",
    "show lldp neighbors", "show version"
  ]

Erros / logs do sistema:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show logging", "show processes cpu",
    "show interfaces brief", "show spanning-tree summary", "show version"
  ]

Interfaces com erros:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show interfaces brief", "show interfaces detail",
    "show spanning-tree summary", "show lldp neighbors", "show version"
  ]

Diagnóstico geral:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show version", "show processes cpu", "show system resource-utilization",
    "show interfaces brief", "show spanning-tree summary",
    "show mac-address-table count", "show lldp neighbors",
    "show ip route summary", "show vlans"
  ]
